creator: kris@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

As has been discusses a number of times on the -stable 
mailing list, which you should be reading if you track -STABLE, 
there is known breakage in the upgrade process from 4.1-RELEASE 
era systems.  There is a workaround involving manually adding 
the missing function to libc.a (see the mailing list archives) 
but this is not recommended for inexperienced users.  In the 
meantime, a binary upgrade is the best solution.
